reviews.comment:
El club no es lo que supo ser. Una institución que se vino abajo, quedó anacrónica y sufrió fuertemente con la tercerización. El buffet muy bueno, el estacionamiento también. El taller, extremadamente descortés é ignorante el recepcionista, caro, ineficiente y mal atendido. El lubricentro bien, los dos locales de accesorios bastante bien surtidos, el que está sobre Brown tiene algunos precios levemente desmesurados, pero es cierto que no es un negocio especializado...

(Translated by Google)
The club isn't what it used to be. An institution that fell apart, became anachronistic, and suffered greatly from outsourcing. The buffet is very good, and so is the parking. The workshop, however, has an extremely rude and ignorant receptionist, is expensive, inefficient, and offers poor service. The lube center is fine, and the two accessory shops are fairly well-stocked; the one on Brown Street has some slightly excessive prices, but it's true that it's not a specialized business...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRN2YtTC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una de las pocas estaciones de servicio rápidas de Mar del Plata. Atienden rápido y no dan vueltas para la carga y el cobro.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the few express gas stations in Mar del Plata. They serve you quickly and don't waste time filling up and paying.
